postView.description: A hydrated view of a soapstone post, including its author, rendered text, location, and aggregate interaction counts.

text.description: The post's message rendered to a display string.

discoveries.description: Total number of interactions (accounts that have seen the post), including those that also rated it.

viewerState.description: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the subject content.

interaction.description: AT-URI of the requesting account's interaction record for this post, if one exists. Presence indicates the account has seen the post.

rating.description: The requesting account's rating of the post, if any. Absent means seen but not rated.

interactionView.description: A view of another account's interaction with a post, including how they rated it (if at all).

rating.description: The account's rating of the post, if any. Absent means seen but not rated.

interactionStats.description: Aggregate interaction counts across one or more posts.

discoveries.description: Total number of interactions (accounts that have seen the post), including those that also rated it.
